title: Inspect and service electric power-assisted bicycles
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Inspect and service electric power-assisted bicycles demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to inspect and service electric power-assisted bicycle

pcs.text: Determine job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Access and interpret manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures 1.3 Select and check tools and equipment for serviceability1.4 Identify hazards associated with the work and manage risks1.5 Prepare work area and plan service sequence to avoid damage to bicycle, minimise waste and use time efficiently
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Access and interpret manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures 1.3 Select and check tools and equipment for serviceability1.4 Identify hazards associated with the work and manage risks1.5 Prepare work area and plan service sequence to avoid damage to bicycle, minimise waste and use time efficiently?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Access and interpret manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures 1.3 Select and check tools and equipment for serviceability1.4 Identify hazards associated with the work and manage risks1.5 Prepare work area and plan service sequence to avoid damage to bicycle, minimise waste and use time efficiently.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to inspect and service electric power-assisted bicycle

elements.title: Inspect bicycle

pcs.text: Inspect condition of bicycle for faults and worn, non-serviceable or damaged parts according to workplace procedures2.2 Identify bicycle components needing repair, replacement or maintenance according to manufacturer specifications2.3 Report inspection findings, and identify and confirm service options and techniques for required repairs or adjustments
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Inspect condition of bicycle for faults and worn, non-serviceable or damaged parts according to workplace procedures2.2 Identify bicycle components needing repair, replacement or maintenance according to manufacturer specifications2.3 Report inspection findings, and identify and confirm service options and techniques for required repairs or adjustments?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Inspect condition of bicycle for faults and worn, non-serviceable or damaged parts according to workplace procedures2.2 Identify bicycle components needing repair, replacement or maintenance according to manufacturer specifications2.3 Report inspection findings, and identify and confirm service options and techniques for required repairs or adjustments.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Inspect bicycle

elements.title: Service bicycle

pcs.text: Carry out routine servicing and maintenance of bicycle according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, and safety and environmental requirements3.2 Carry out post-service testing and operation checks on serviced bicycle according to manufacturer specifications, and make adjustments as required3.3 Report results and quality issues to authorised personnel as required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Carry out routine servicing and maintenance of bicycle according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, and safety and environmental requirements3.2 Carry out post-service testing and operation checks on serviced bicycle according to manufacturer specifications, and make adjustments as required3.3 Report results and quality issues to authorised personnel as required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Carry out routine servicing and maintenance of bicycle according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, and safety and environmental requirements3.2 Carry out post-service testing and operation checks on serviced bicycle according to manufacturer specifications, and make adjustments as required3.3 Report results and quality issues to authorised personnel as required.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Service bicycle

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Clean bicycle, conduct final inspection to ensure work meets workplace expectations, and confirm bicycle is ready for use4.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures4.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean bicycle, conduct final inspection to ensure work meets workplace expectations, and confirm bicycle is ready for use4.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures4.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean bicycle, conduct final inspection to ensure work meets workplace expectations, and confirm bicycle is ready for use4.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures4.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Complete work processes

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
